channel.title: Library on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Library on Arrans github.io

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: evanwashere/mitata
item.description: benchmark tooling that loves you ❤️

item.title: open-source-labs/Svelvet
item.description: 🎛 A Svelte library for building dynamic, infinitely customizable node-based user interfaces and flowcharts

item.title: avamsi/climate
item.description: “CLI Mate” autogenerates CLIs from structs / functions (nested subcommands, global / local flags, help generation, typo suggestions, shell completion etc.)

item.title: pseidemann/finish
item.description: A non-intrusive, zero dependency library adding a graceful shutdown to Go HTTP servers.

item.title: arran4/tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos

item.title: arran4/datastoreutils
item.description: Basic google cloud datastore helpers

item.title: arran4/dsquery
item.description: A google datastore query aggregator and compiler with some minor enhancements

item.title: arran4/gaelogger
item.description: Another google apps engine go logger this one is for the new go111+ world..

item.title: arran4/md2png
item.description: Very basic generated md2png

item.title: arran4/txtar
item.description: txtar enhanced and with a cli tool

item.title: arran4/dart-libayatana-appindicator-glib
item.description: Ayatana Application Indicators Library (Dart port)

item.title: arran4/dart_xdg_status_notifier_item
item.description: Allows status notifications (i.e. system tray) on Linux desktops using the StatusNotifierItem specification.

item.title: arran4/strings2
item.description: Some golang string helper functions focused around case transformation but other things in the future.

item.title: arran4/dart_unix_single_instance
item.description: A library which uses unix sockets to ensure a single instance

item.title: arran4/go-be-lazy
item.description: Varidct based behavoural lazy evaluation

item.title: arran4/go-pattern
item.description: image.Image patterns

item.title: arran4/go-evaluator
item.description: A simple evaluation markup with a simple parser too.

item.title: arran4/dartobjectutils
item.description: Dart Constructor Type Enforcement / Conversion

item.title: arran4/go-consume
item.description: String and slice consumption librareis

item.title: arran4/go-rfc5849-hmac
item.description: Implementation of rfc5849 hmac wrapper
